allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const s=j.seasonality; console.log\('ok:', j.ok\); console.log\('symbol:', s?.symbol\); console.log\('dataPointCount:', s?.dataPointCount\); console.log\('seasonalBias:', s?.seasonalBias\); console.log\('seasonalityScore:', s?.seasonalityScore\); console.log\('seasonalStrikeRisk:', s?.seasonalStrikeRisk\); console.log\('activeWindowNow:', JSON.stringify\(s?.activeWindowNow\)\); console.log\('bestBullish[0]:', JSON.stringify\(s?.bestBullishWindows?.[0]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('C:\\\\Temp\\\\aapl_seas.json'\); const s=j.seasonality; console.log\('ok:', j.ok, '| symbol:', s?.symbol, '| dataPoints:', s?.dataPointCount, '| bias:', s?.seasonalBias, '| score:', s?.seasonalityScore, '| risk:', s?.seasonalStrikeRisk\); console.log\('activeWindow:', JSON.stringify\(s?.activeWindowNow\)\); console.log\('bestBullish[0]:', JSON.stringify\(s?.bestBullishWindows?.[0]\)\);")
